CONDITION_COVENANT_RESTRICTION.RestrictionDescription: The subject holds a Historic Designation in the National Register of Historic Places; has a positive impact on its value and marketability.

ENVIRONMENTAL_CONDITION.EnvironmentalConditionIdentifiedDescript: Rainwater runoff can carry pesticides, plastics, wastewater, and agricultural runoff that is released into the Potomac.

FLOOR_COVERING.ImprovementComponentConditionDescription: The flooring throughout the subject has been replaced over the last 2-5 years.

PROPERTY_UNIT_DETAIL.UnitValuationCommentText: Additional commentary can be added here, if needed by Appraiser.

ROOM_DETAIL.RoomConditionAdditionalDescription: Bathroom has a new jacuzzi jetted tub and vanities, flooring, shower with subway tile, and upgraded shower head.
ROOM_DETAIL.RoomQualityDescription: High-end residential fixtures and nice decorative finishes

ROOM_DETAIL.RoomConditionAdditionalDescription: Kitchen has been updated with new fixtures, flooring, and lighting.
ROOM_DETAIL.RoomQualityDescription: A mix of restaurant grade and high-end residential appliances

STRUCTURE_DETAIL.StructureValuationCommentText: Additional commentary can be added here, if needed by Appraiser.

MARKET_DETAIL.MarketBoundariesDescription: Hall Street NW to the North; Bunker Hill Drive NW to the South; Potomac River to the West; Grant St. NW to the East
MARKET_DETAIL.MarketInventorySearchParameterDescriptio: The search criteria that the appraiser used to limit their search included a structure design focused on High Rises and an Ownership structure of Cooperative. Additional limiting factors included between 1 and 2 Full Bathrooms, 1-2 Bedrooms, a Finished Area Above Grade between 1000 and 1400 Sq. Ft., 1-2 Parking Spaces. Additionally, the building would ideally be constructed between 1960 and 1975, with a closing date between 08/28/2018 and 08/28/2019.

MARKET_TREND.PriceTrendsAnalysisDescription: A price trend analysis of the MLS data for the past year for 1-2 bedroom co-ops in this market area is stable with no discernible movement in prices, exhibiting economic equilibrium.

PROJECT_ANALYSIS.ProjectAnalysisGroundRentDescription: The ground rent has been stable over the last five years. The ground rent is controlled through the City of Washington, D.C.

BODY_OF_WATER.BodyOfWaterDescription: The Potomac River is approximately 1 mile from the subject's location.

PROPERTY_NOT_USED_DETAIL.AdditionalPropertyAnalyzedNotUsedText: The unit is much smaller than the subject.
More recently sold comparable properties were available.
This unit has more bathrooms and bedrooms than the subject; it's also a larger unit.
This unit has more bathrooms and bedrooms than the subject; it's also a larger unit.
This unit has a water view of the river and is larger in size when compared to the subject.

SALES_COMPARISON_APPROACH_DETAIL.SalesComparisonCommentDescription: The Comparable Sales selected for use in this report were selected for their similar characteristics and location. While comparing each property to the subject I found the following: Comp #1 is the most similar to the subject; it is located in the same building and on the same floor level as the subject. Further, it is the most similar in size, condition, and quality. Comp #2 is larger in size but still located in the same building; its condition and quality are similar to the subject. Comp #3 is from a competing project located close to the subject; it is slightly smaller in size, in similar condition, and the project amenities are effectively equal to those of the subject project. Comp #3 is not a historically designated property.

VALUATION_COMMENTARY.ValuationCommentText: Shareholders are participating in an energy efficiency incentive program which will cut energy costs by 30% over the next two years. The impact on value and marketability is beneficial.
There is a private transfer fee that is paid at settlement. There is no impact to marketability, the transfer fee is a typical fee paid in this market for cooperative transfers.
There is a small dry cleaner located on project premises.
Add comment if needed.
Add comment if needed.
Shareholders of the Project have agreed to participate in the Urban Tree Foundation’s campaign to plant 60 trees throughout the project’s common areas; to date only 12 have been installed.
Additional commentary can be added here, if needed by Appraiser.
Additional commentary can be added here, if needed by Appraiser.
Additional commentary can be added here, if needed by Appraiser.
Additional commentary can be added here, if needed by Appraiser.
Additional commentary can be added here, if needed by Appraiser.

The original use for the subject's project was apartment rental units, up until the cooperative conversion. Additionally, the project offers office space for use on the property. This office space is located within the project and has no impact to value/marketability.
Additional commentary can be added here, if needed by Appraiser.
Additional commentary can be added here, if needed by Appraiser.

The site is located approximately one mile from the Potomac River. This location provides beneficial water views for units located above the third floor, on the side of the buildings facing the river. Units on the opposite side of the building do not have water views. In regards to the environmental condition, pollutants have been identified and can contain Endocrine Disruptors (EDCs) that are not completely removed in treatment plants. During periods shortly after heavy rainstorms, the residents in the area are advised not to swim in the Potomac River due to these hazards. Even so, there is no measurable adverse impact on marketability or values concerning the subject. The demand for housing in the subject's market has remained consistent over the years.
Additional commentary can be added here, if needed by Appraiser.
The contract was accepted 8/23/2019; the buyer has deposited a check in the amount of $10,000.

The subject property was marketed on the local Multiple Listing Service for a total of 31 days before accepting a contract offer; this time frame meets current market norms. No other recent listings of the subject were discovered during my research.
Additional commentary can be added here, if needed by Appraiser.
The subject unit has received recent, extensive updating throughout, which translates to Q3 and C3.
A search of local MLS reveal no recent listings or transfers of the subject property.
Comp #1's prior transfer indicates an increasing market (to its most recent sale price) as documented in the Market section of this report.
Additional commentary can be added here, if needed by Appraiser.

VALUATION_RECONCILIATION_DETAIL.ValuationReconciliationSummaryCommentDes: Utilize this subsection for additional commentary as required by USPAP.

VALUATION_REPORT_DETAIL.MeasurementStandardPublisherTypeOtherDes: Not Applicable due to property type
